creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Kimura-san!

Thanks for debugging. That's very helpful.

Could you try this on your problematic installation ?


  $ truss -s 500 -f emacs --eval '(kill-emacs)' 2>/tmp/emacs.err

And attach the /tmp/emacs.err to this bug report, or you can investigate yourself by grep-ing for the error message in the file, and then checking to see if there are any failed syscalls around that, which can shed some light on this ? My guess is likely not, as you mention that it's a userspace problem.

Thanks!
